data.title: Billionaire Banker Backs Trump's 'Shock And Awe' Tariff Policies, Slams Bill Ackman's Call For 90-Day Pause
data.description: Andrew Beal, the billionaire founder and owner of Beal Financial Corporation, has publicly supported President Donald Trump's contentious tariff policies, despite the resulting upheaval in the financial markets.

data.title: Despite Tariff Turmoil, Bitcoin Outperforms 'Magnificent 7' Stocks In 2025 — Records Smaller Losses Than Nvidia, Tesla, Apple
data.description:
Stocks and cryptocurrencies have been punched hard amid fears of economic fallout from President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariff measures.



Even so, Bitcoin, the world's largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, has fared better than some of Wall Street’s tech behemoths.

data.title: Seth Klarman Learnt Warren Buffett's 'Lifetime Punch Card' Secret Long Ago — And It Helped Him Consistently Outperform The Market
data.description: Legendary hedge fund manager Seth Klarman credits Warren Buffett's punch card philosophy for his investment success.

data.title: Alien Enemies Act Survives Court Challenge — Trump Gains Green Light For Swift Deportations
data.description: The Supreme Court has temporarily allowed President Donald Trump to invoke the 1798 Alien Enemies Act for rapid deportations of suspected gang members while litigation continues.

data.title: Suze Orman Advises 'Calm' To Those 'Afraid Of What's Happening' In The Market: Here's Her Game Plan To Tackle 2022-Style Volatility
data.description: Suze Orman addressed investor anxiety amid turbulent markets, highlighting potential opportunities like Alliant CU CDs and advising metrics over emotion.
